subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-25 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In the meeting of Mu'tamid, the Bab was asked whether the Qur'an was an authority and a proof for those who were present… I strove to the utmost so that Mirza 'Ali-Asghar Khan
subcodes.first_line_orig: من بايد و ذکر آن نفوس مبارکه خوشنود... وقتی در مجلس معتمد از حضرت نقطه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
